summary: End-to-end Playwright test of the Della Resorts /guest flow + cross-screen session memory ripple to /receptionist and /gm. All 11 acceptance criteria pass with zero functional defects. Signature gating logic (canvas ink AND consent toggle), localStorage persistence (key 'della_resorts_state_v1'), and Context-driven state propagation all work correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Step4Signature.jsx: setHasInk(true) is fired in mousedown handler regardless of whether the user actually drags. A bare click without drag will enable the submit button even though no visible ink is on the canvas. Consider gating hasInk on the first successful move(), or on a non-empty canvas signature data check, to better match the stated UX requirement 'signature has ink'.

AppContext seed includes hard-coded reservations with arrival '2026-02-18' — these will silently disappear from the Receptionist table once the demo date passes. Consider deriving arrivals relative to today() for evergreen demo behavior.

GuestFlow.jsx stores the entire form payload (including base64 signature dataURL) in localStorage via markFormSubmitted -> checkinPayload. Base64 PNGs can be large; recommend either downscaling or stripping the signature from the persisted payload to stay within localStorage quota for repeated submissions.

Confirmation/Receptionist screens reference RES-2401 directly; if seed data is wiped via the Reset button without page reload, transitions are graceful, but a manual localStorage clear mid-flow would surface a fallback to reservations[0] in GuestFlow.jsx — minor robustness note.
test_credentials: N/A — no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: None; pre-seeded reservations in AppContext.jsx (RES-2401..RES-2407) were used as-is. localStorage was cleared before run to ensure a clean baseline.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All flows verified through Playwright on preview URL. Key observation: the submit-checkin button correctly stays disabled with only ink OR only consent, and enables only when both are satisfied. Activity log entry 'Pre-check-in form submitted for RES-2401' surfaces in /gm. Refresh persistence via localStorage key 'della_resorts_state_v1' confirmed. If retesting in future, canvas drawing must use page.mouse.move/down/up sequence inside the canvas bounding box — a single click without drag does NOT register ink visually (though the current code sets hasInk on mousedown).
